patch.value: Unit tests + functional verification + README + decisions

node --test unit tests for new pure fns (buildSearchQuery/matcher, validate result builder, export plan builder). Functional: import w/ filters, upsert re-import, search, export --dry-run, validate against real public repo. Update README. Record decisions.

Added 8 unit tests (buildExportPlan create/update, exportWillApply precedence, buildSearchUrl, mapSearchHits, resolveSearchRepo, search-provider + validate registration) — 16/16 pass. Functional vs real public repo sindresorhus/slugify: activation ok:1/warnings:[]; import --state all=34; re-import=0 new/34 updated/0 dupes; --labels bug=1 (matches gh); search 'dashes' --semantic=2 hits mapped to local items; export dry-run-default would_update:34 + --json plan; validate ok/accessible + exit 3 on 404. README updated.
